title: Removing Consecutive Repeated Characters with Edge Cases

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.outputFormat: The modified string with no consecutive repeated characters
statement.notes: The input string will only contain lowercase ASCII letters.

starterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: string solve(string s); };
starterCode.java: public class Solution { public String solve(String s); }
starterCode.python:
class Solution:
    def solve(self, s: str) -> str:

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: string solve(string s) { string result; for (char c : s) if (result.empty() || result.back() != c) result += c; return result; } };
buggyStarterCode.java: public class Solution { public String solve(String s) { StringBuilder result = new StringBuilder(); for (int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) if (result.isEmpty() || result.charAt(result.length() - 1) != s.charAt(i)) result.append(s.charAt(i)); return result.toString(); } }
